title: Oil gains as the geopolitical backdrop worsens
section_path: Oil gains as the geopolitical backdrop worsens
section_path_text: Oil gains as the geopolitical backdrop worsens
summary:
Main
Geopolitical risks pushed energy prices higher. Supply side issues remained the focus for metals, while low inflation supported precious metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: image.png | assets/2024-04-02_oil-gains-as-the-geopolitical-backdrop-worsens_img_image_be601d31de1d.png
With the London Metal Exchange closed, base metal markets were subdued in Asia and the US.
